plugins.name: brandguide-ai-free
plugins.description: Expert brand methodology assistant powered by brandguideAI. Build professional brand systems for software products -- color palettes, typography, voice guidelines, and visual identity. Based on 25+ years of brand methodology by Serfőző Peter (500+ brands, 3 bestselling books). Free mode with embedded knowledge, or connect your API key for the full 1000+ page source-backed knowledge base.
